title: Add an Order with Items
description: Insert a new order for customer "alice-johnson" with status "pending" and a total of 15.97. Include an items array with at least one item.
concept: MongoDB documents can contain nested structures like arrays of objects. An order's items array holds objects with product details, making it easy to store related data together.
hint: Include nested items: db.orders.insertOne({customerId: "alice-johnson", status: "pending", total: 15.97, items: [{product: "Organic Milk", qty: 2, price: 4.99}], ...})
